headline: Eval run over 26 labeled patients (14 failed): 16 dev-labeled (3 disagreement(s)), 10 held-out (0 disagreement(s)). Care Gap sensitivity 100.0%, Risk sensitivity n/a (denominator 0), SDOH agreement 50.0%.
